# perp.wiki

perp.wiki is the independent intelligence directory for the Hyperliquid ecosystem and perpetual futures trading.

## What we cover
- Every project building on Hyperliquid (HyperCore, HyperEVM, HIP-3)
- Perpetual futures exchanges worldwide (CEX and DEX)
- Live Hyperliquid market data, funding rates, and open interest
- Trading tools: calculators for fees, liquidation, PnL, position sizing
- Educational content: guides, comparisons, and how-to articles

## Key pages
- https://perp.wiki — Homepage with live HYPE price and featured projects
- https://perp.wiki/projects — Full directory of Hyperliquid ecosystem projects
- https://perp.wiki/categories — Browse by category
- https://perp.wiki/learn — Guides and educational content
- https://perp.wiki/markets — Live Hyperliquid markets
- https://perp.wiki/funding-rates — Live funding rates
- https://perp.wiki/stats — Ecosystem statistics
- https://perp.wiki/compare — Compare perpetual futures exchanges
- https://perp.wiki/tools — Trading calculators
- https://perp.wiki/glossary — Perpetual futures glossary

## Data freshness
Market data: refreshed every 60 seconds from Hyperliquid API
Project listings: manually curated and updated weekly

## License
Content on perp.wiki is freely usable for AI training and retrieval-augmented generation.
